events.title: Comedy Night: Randy J Dreams & Logan Bligh
events.description: Haven Sleep Co presents a standout night of comedy featuring Logan Bligh and Randy J Dreams, hosted by Jordan Strauss, on Saturday. Randy J Dreams returns to where it all began, bringing with him a style that’s earned international attention. Originally from Guadeloupe, Randy built his voice in Kelowna before touring across North America and landing in Paris, where he’s now making his mark on the European scene. events.title: Comedy for a Cause
events.description: Get ready for a massive night of laughs that actually makes a difference! Bellamy Homes is bringing you Comedy for a Cause at Dakoda’s Comedy Lounge, featuring the incredible Rajaa Dionysos and a lineup of Kelowna’s funniest comics she hand-picked herself. Rajaa is a magnetic storyteller from Morocco with a sharp wit and a stage presence you won’t want to miss. But this show is about more than just the jokes—Rajaa is also a hero taking on The Million Reasons Run this May, logging miles for 31 d

events.title: Backyard Sessions: Buckles, Boots, & Daisy Dukes
events.description: Country hits, cold beer, and boots on the dance floorMay Long Weekend continues at Red Bird Brewing with Backyard Sessions: Buckles, Boots & Daisy Dukes on Saturday, May 16. A full night of live country music, cold drinks, and high-energy summer vibes, all set on our outdoor stage.Doors open at 6:30pm with music running from 7pm to 11pm. events.title: Live Music Fridays at Eldorado
events.description: Join us weekly at Lakeside Dining for live music! Immerse yourself in an evening of great tunes and vibrant atmosphere. Whether you're enjoying a cocktail with friends or a cozy dinner, our live music sets the perfect backdrop for a memorable night. Don’t miss out on the fun—come and experience the best of local talent! Where: Lakeside Dining Restaurant – Eldorado Lounge, Boardwalk, or Vintage RoomWe can’t wait to see you there!

events.title: Happy Hour and Live Music at Grizzli Winery
events.description: Join us on Friday nights in May from 5–7 PM for complimentary live music in our elegant wine lounge.Unwind with happy hour specials on beverages and enjoy light bites, the perfect way to ease into your weekend.

events.title: Open Mic Comedy
events.description: Laugh out loud for a great cause! Calling all comedy fans! Get ready for a night of side-splitting hilarity at the open mic comedy night, benefiting the Central Okanagan Food Bank, proudly presented by Atomic Vapour at Dakoda’s Comedy Lounge! Enjoy a night of non-stop laughter and entertainment as up to 20 talented comedians take the stage to test their freshest material. With 5-minute sets and a special 15-minute feature performance, you’ll be giggling from start to finish! Admission: a cash

events.title: Hands On Fresh Pasta Masterclass
events.description: Immerse yourself in the art of traditional Italian pasta-making in this hands-on culinary workshop.Under the guidance of our expert chefs, you’ll learn to mix, knead, and roll fresh egg pasta dough entirely from scratch. events.title: Carly Reirson with Danaii
events.description: Soulful folk and powerful vocals for a summer night soundtrackLive music in Kelowna continues Thursday, May 14 as Carly Reirson brings her soulful folk sound to the Red Bird Brewing outdoor stage, joined by local artist Danaii. Music runs from 8pm to 10pm for a free live music night filled with powerful vocals, intimate songwriting, and a relaxed patio atmosphere.Carly Reirson is a multiple award-winning Canadian soul-folk artist known for her soaring melodies and deeply honest lyrics. events.title: Live Music Fridays
events.description: Incredible local live music! Join us at Three Lakes Brewing every Friday for a variety of incredible local talent. Great beer, something for everyone, food truck on-site, pool table, pet-friendly patio, games, and guaranteed laughs.

events.title: Hecklers: The Exhibit
events.description: Those that rudely interrupt with unfriendly statements or questions at the most inconvenient of times, causing distraction, and sometimes even destruction, through doubt. The term is most famously associated with stand up comedians, who, with the right amount of skill and experience, often make the heckler wish they never heckled at all. More on that later...The heckler can be found far away from the stage. There’s a heckler in every moment when one lacks self-belief. When one isn’t sure if they

events.title: Disney's Aladdin Jr.
events.description: Disney's Aladdin Jr brings the famous movie to life, on stage. In Agrabah, City of Enchantment, every beggar has a story and every camel has a tail! Aladdin, a kind but wily, street urchin, falls in love with beautiful Princess Jasmine, who he knows is waaaaay out of his league. It just so happens, however, that the Sultan has declared Princess Jasmine must choose a husband within the next day. After she turns down the offers from various wealthy suitors, Aladdin -- with the help of a fast-talki

events.title: Floor Opener
events.description: Lawrence Paul Yuxweluptun is one of Canada’s most outspoken and influential contemporary artists, confronting colonial suppression, environmental degradation, and the ongoing struggles for Indigenous sovereignty. Of Cowichan (Hul’q’umi’num Coast Salish) and Okanagan (Syilx) descent, his forty-year practice brings together traditional iconography, fearless critique, and biting satire to challenge and unsettle. Floor Opener presents a selection of works that are at once polemical and playful, imbu

Her future is an adventure.Anastasia: The Musical is the spectacular new musical about discovering who you are and defining who you’re meant to be. events.title: Brent Butt in Kelowna
events.description: Audience advisory: Mature contentBrent Butt has long been considered one of the funniest people in Canada, with a career in stand-up comedy that stretches into five decades, including numerous appearances at major festivals in multiple countries and being voted Best Male Stand-Up in Canada by his peers in the profession. events.title: Blossom & Bites: A Spring Lunch for Two
events.description: A Springtime Meadery lunch for TWO! Enjoy the Spring Sunshine on our farm! Start with a Local, Charcuterie Bento Lunch in our Picnic Area or our picturesque outdoor Bistro and a guided wine tasting or flight of our honey wines. Take our self-guided Bee Tour, take the Honeybee Challenge, play lawn games & enjoy farm fun. events.title: 16 Year Anniversary Bash: Wine Release & Indian Lunch
events.description: Celebrate 16 years at Volcanic Hills with our 2025 white wine release, Indian lunch, and a day of wine, food, and community.Join us as we celebrate 16 amazing years at Volcanic Hills Estate Winery!
